feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from americascomic

entry.title: my @npr tiny desk audition! I'm so excited for this chance to shine! #nprtinydeskconcert #nprtinydeskcontest #nprtinydesk #npr #amberiscuteandfunny

entry.title: Replying to @manic.pixie.riotgrrrl as a Gothamite, Bruce Wayne is NOT Batman #gothamtok #gothamtiktok #gothamcity #gothamfyp #gotham
entry.content: Replying to @manic.pixie.riotgrrrl as a Gothamite, Bruce Wayne is NOT Batman #gothamtok #gothamtiktok #gothamcity #gothamfyp #gotham

entry.title: lesbian bar discourse. I went to 3 funerals in a month earlier this year, and in the aftermath, watching as my pocket of community both tear itself apart and try to bring itself together was a really brutal lesson in community and power. I say in the vid
entry.content: lesbian bar discourse. I went to 3 funerals in a month earlier this year, and in the aftermath, watching as my pocket of community both tear itself apart and try to bring itself together was a really brutal lesson in community and power. I say in the vid

entry.title: everybody tense up! I'm gonna talk about race (and transgenderism)! #antiracism #blackliberation #trans #blacklivesmatter #allyship101
entry.content: everybody tense up! I'm gonna talk about race (and transgenderism)! #antiracism #blackliberation #trans #blacklivesmatter #allyship101
